nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or inefficient collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: I asked it to come up with a table of contents without any kind of guidance. I used that as my 'rough draft.'

nodes.label: AI memory and context retention
nodes.grounding_span: it does a LOT is not remember previous parts of our conversation

nodes.label: AI adherence to user specifications
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to follow complex constraints
nodes.grounding_span: if I give the AI too many guidelines, it has a hard time

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: Write solutions to problems that are CONSISTENT

nodes.label: Human writing and creative control
nodes.grounding_span: I avoid using it for specific writing tasks, like actually writing the content of the lesson

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in generated content
nodes.label_negative: AI generating incorrect or misaligned content
nodes.grounding_span: it gave me problems that would not fulfill a certain objective correctly

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it was helpful to have a starting point

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want to get in trouble with the client for plagiarism

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment and skill mastery
nodes.grounding_span: I am a writer, and I enjoy the writing process

nodes.label: Educational quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I need consistency in process and formatting

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: AI is also extremely helpful for quickly getting solutions

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as memory aid
nodes.grounding_span: it is no longer efficient to take the time to remind the AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's failure to follow rules
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of figuring out how to reword... it decides to split the offending objective into 2

nodes.label: Desire for AI consistency in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I need consistency in process and formatting

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I avoid using it for specific writing tasks

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI will ever replace a trained educator in creating curriculum

nodes.label: Systematic iterative verification — works independently first, then checks with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I usually start out by asking AI. If it gives a good answer, I will usually continue the conversation.

nodes.label: Domain expertise as primary filter
nodes.grounding_span: I have a lot of education and experience in high school curriculum. I can pretty easily spot when there is something awry.
